title: (Senior) Relationship Manager, Commercial Banking
detail_content: A A A EN Job Descriptions (English Only) Role Details Reference Number CMB/SRM Job Title (Senior) Relationship Manager, Commercial Banking Unit/Department Commercial Banking Location Hong Kong Job Posted 2025/11/28 Job Status Full Time Main Responsibilities - Manage a portfolio of commercial clients who need financial services and customized products to meet their financial needs- Prospect and generate new business by focusing on enhancing existing relationships, and identifying opportunities for uptiering- Interview prospective clients to collect information concerning their business needs, desires, abilities, and earnings to determine the business opportunities- Use analytical skills and knowledge of credit policies to evaluate the financial condition of the clients, make credit recommendations for Management's approval Requirements - Degree holder in Business, Economics or related disciplines is preferred- Minimum 3 years of banking experience in trade financing and commercial banking; candidates with more relevant experience could be considered for the position of Senior Relationship Manager- Qualifications in IIQE/HKSI related areas are preferred- Knowledge of the principles of commercial credit and lending policies and standards- Strong business development skills and proficiency in the financial services/products offered to middle market companies- Good communication skills in both English and Chinese (Cantonese & Putonghua)- The employment is subject to Mandatory Reference Checking Scheme (MRCS) as per regulatory requirement.To apply, please send your application along with your resume to "recruithk@asia.ccb.com". Applicants who are not contacted within 8 weeks may consider their applications unsuccessful and their personal data will be retained by the bank for a period up to two years.All information provided by applicants will be used for recruitment purposes only and will be used strictly in accordance with the bank’s personal data policies, a copy of which will be provided upon request. title: Portfolio Advisor
detail_content: A A A EN Job Descriptions (English Only) Role Details Reference Number CB/WM/PA Job Title Portfolio Advisor Unit/Department Consumer Banking Location Hong Kong Job Posted 2025/12/30 Job Status Full Time Main Responsibilities - Drive sales activities to assist branches in delivering their investment business- Act as point of contact for all branches on investment enquiries related to mutual funds /structured products/bonds- Perform joint call with relationship managers to review client portfolio and present investment ideas to clients- Provide backup and support in business activities, i.e. seminars and promotion programs so to achieve investment sales target- Constant update of product knowledge on mutual funds and investment products to all branches- Provide training and coaching to frontline associates- Perform portfolio review and formulate investment strategy for high networth clients. Able to offer tailored investment planning advice and develop investment proposal for sophisticated clients- Liaise with relevant internal departments on compliance, marketing, operations and systems issues- Represent the Bank in working with external business partners, i.e. fund management companies Requirements - University graduate with at least 5 years relevant sales experience in investment products, experience in mutual fund, FX and structured products is a must- Possess HKSI qualification or equivalent- CFP / CFA qualification preferred- Excellent knowledge in mutual fund, FX and investment products- Good command of written and spoken English, Cantonese and Putonghua- Strong communication, presentation and interpersonal skills- The employment is subject to Mandatory Reference Checking Scheme (MRCS) as per regulatory requirement.To apply, please submit your application along with your resume to "recruithk@asia.ccb.com". Applicants who are not contacted within 8 weeks may consider their applications unsuccessful and their personal data will be retained by the bank for a period up to two years.All information provided by applicants will be used for recruitment purposes only and will be used strictly in accordance with the bank’s personal data policies, a copy of which will be provided upon request. title: Senior Relationship Manager, Global Banking
detail_content: A A A EN Job Descriptions (English Only) Role Details Reference Number CB/GB/SRM Job Title Senior Relationship Manager, Global Banking Unit/Department Consumer Banking Location Hong Kong Job Posted 2025/12/30 Job Status Full Time Main Responsibilities - Actively solicit new business and deepen existing and new relationships within the high net worth market segment- Promote full range of banking and wealth management products and services- Perform other service-related duties assigned by the Branch Manager- Comply with the regulatory requirements as well as the internal compliance policies and guidelines including but not limited to anti-money laundering and counter-financing of terrorism. Requirements - University Degree Holder Degree or above- At least 5 years' sales experience in consumer banking- Qualifications in IIQE & HKSI related areas are required- Sales and customer oriented, with good communication and interpersonal skills- Self-motivated and able to work under pressure- Good spoken English and Cantonese, fluent in Putonghua is a must- Broad knowledge of all aspects of retail banking business- Frequent travel is required- The employment is subject to Mandatory Reference Checking Scheme (MRCS) as per regulatory requirement.To apply, please submit your application along with your resume to "recruithk@asia.ccb.com". Applicants who are not contacted within 8 weeks may consider their applications unsuccessful and their personal data will be retained by the bank for a period up to two years.All information provided by applicants will be used for recruitment purposes only and will be used strictly in accordance with the bank’s personal data policies, a copy of which will be provided upon request.
